hero.title: Your trusted sourcing and export partner
hero.subtitle: GlobaLink is a China-based sourcing and trading partner that helps businesses simplify purchasing, production coordination, quality control, and international exports.

about.title: About GlobaLink
about.description: GlobaLink is a China-based sourcing and trading partner that helps businesses simplify purchasing, production coordination, quality control, and international exports. We connect global buyers with verified manufacturers, manage communication across languages and time zones, and oversee each stage from supplier selection to final delivery. Our goal is to reduce sourcing risk, improve transparency, and ensure consistent product quality while helping clients save time and cost.
about.relevanceTitle: What makes GlobaLink relevant to buyers:
relevancePoints: Supplier identification and verification across trusted factory networks
Price, MOQ, lead-time, and contract negotiation support
Pre-shipment quality inspections and production follow-up
End-to-end logistics coordination and export documentation
Multi-factory order consolidation to reduce shipping costs
Ongoing communication bridge between buyer and manufacturer
about.trustDescription: We prioritize verified suppliers, clear reporting, and structured process control to help clients avoid common sourcing issues such as quality inconsistency, delayed production, and unreliable communication.

items.title: Supplier and factory sourcing
items.description: We identify dependable manufacturers for toys, electronics, textiles, furniture, and educational materials.

items.title: Price and contract negotiation
items.description: We help negotiate competitive pricing, payment terms, and production schedules.

items.title: Quality control and inspections
items.description: We coordinate checks before shipment to ensure products meet required quality standards.

items.title: Communication management
items.description: We bridge language and cultural gaps between buyers and factories throughout production.

items.title: Logistics and export coordination
items.description: We manage shipping, export documents, customs procedures, packaging, and delivery coordination.

items.title: Risk reduction and supplier verification
items.description: We work with verified manufacturers to reduce sourcing risk and avoid unreliable suppliers.

items.title: Order consolidation
items.description: We combine products from multiple factories into one export to reduce transport cost and improve efficiency.
